chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 8392 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 36743/2018 2. For hearing of main case 07.02.2025 Ms. Dilkhurram Shaheen, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly submitted that the controversy herein has already been determined by a Division Bench of this court in CP D 1089 of 2016. In view of the reasoning and rationale therein this petition is also dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
